Ammunition is used with two-handed Distance Weapons, mostly by Paladins.

Technically, **Bolts** are used exclusively with **Crossbows**, while **Arrows** are designed for **Bows**. To use them effectively, you must equip the weapon in your hand and place a Quiver containing the projectiles in your **extra slot** or **shield slot**.

Note: Placing the quiver in the extra slot is generally recommended, as it leaves the shield slot free for items like the Bounty Talisman.

  • BOWS (Equipment & Ammo)
  • CROSSBOWS (Equipment & Ammo)

  • Armors
